criteria_verification.criterion_text: Prerequisite fix**: line 176 of `confidence-gated-checkpoint-protocol.feature` uses an informal `Or` keyword that breaks Gherkin parsing. Replace the two-line construct in scenario "A mandatory-human-approval decision must not masquerade as a threshold-based approval" with valid Gherkin (e.g. `And` joining two assertions, or a composite Then-clause). Verify `feature-plan-bdd-link prepare` parses the file without error before continuing
criteria_verification.evidence: Replaced `Then ... Or the decision should record no threshold value at all` with `Then the decision should be marked as a constitutional override with no threshold applied / And the decision should record no threshold value at all`. Confirmed `feature-plan-bdd-link prepare` returns status=ready, scenarios_to_match=32 with no parser error.
